content.fact: Sirius Black is dead after the Department of Mysteries battle, and Harry is grieving.
content.injection: After the Department of Mysteries battle, Sirius Black is dead and Harry is grieving unless our story has established a different outcome. Enforce this as a high-priority Context gate for Order of the Phoenix: Year 5; block contradictory later-book or earlier-state knowledge unless accepted story lore explicitly overrides it.
constraints: Apply only when Saga Context matches Order of the Phoenix: Year 5; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.
This card should be promoted when its characters, topics, or objects appear because it prevents timeline leakage.
antiLore: Do not let generic model memory, film shorthand, fanon, or later-book knowledge override the active book Context.
Do not reveal, assume, or discuss this outcome before the relevant anchor/window is active unless the user has created an AU branch.

temporalTightening.method: curated chronology point event: validFrom plus 10 days
temporalTightening.notes: End date narrowed so event-like lore does not remain active as an open-ended suggestion.
